data.title: Canadian Central Bank Analyzes Risks in DeFi Lending
data.description: The Canadian central bank has released a report titled 'DeFi Lending: Returns, Leverage, and Liquidation Risks.' According to Foresight News, the report examines decentralized lending on Aave V3, utilizing transaction-level data to analyze its revenue model, borrower behavior, and liquidation dynamics. The findings indicate that protocol revenues are concentrated in a few tokens, and many users engage in recursive leverage operations despite over-collateralization requirements. Liquidations occur in concentrated waves but have limited impact on the broader market. Overall, while DeFi lending is operationally feasible with proper governance, it faces constraints related to capital efficiency, liquidation risks, and vulnerabilities within the crypto ecosystem.

data.title: Coinglass Q1 Crypto Market Report: Derivatives Remain Dominant, Binance Leads Across Multiple Metrics
data.description: According to Coinglass's 2026 Q1 Cryptocurrency Market Share Research Report, the overall cryptocurrency market maintained relatively high activity levels, though trading volumes gradually declined from their January highs. Total market spot volume in Q1 was approximately $1.94 trillion, derivatives volume approximately $18.63 trillion, totaling roughly $20.57 trillion, with a derivatives-to-spot ratio of about 9.6x. Structurally, market activity remained primarily concentrated in the derivatives market, while spot trading contracted by a relatively larger margin.Binance retained industry leadership on core metrics: derivatives volume of approximately $4.90 trillion represented a share of about 34.9% among the top 10 exchanges, average daily open interest of approximately $23.9 billion corresponded to a 29.9% share, and user asset reserves of approximately $152.9 billion accounted for about 73.5% among major centralized exchanges.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Solana Foundation Introduces Solana Agent Skills for AI Integration
data.description:
The Solana Foundation has announced the launch of Solana Agent Skills, which offers pre-built skills that can be directly integrated into AI tools. According to Foresight News, these skills can be installed with a single line of code, enabling the creation of agents capable of interacting with Solana.

The official skills include features such as common error handling, security checklists, confidential transfers, and version compatibility. Additionally, over 60 community-developed skills are available, covering areas like DeFi, payments, infrastructure, and tools. These skills are sourced from platforms such as JupiterExchange, Raydium, Helius, dflow, and Metaplex.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic Adjusts Claude Subscription Policy
data.description: Anthropic has announced changes to its Claude subscription policy. According to Foresight News, starting April 5 at 3:00 UTC+8, the subscription will no longer include access to third-party tools such as OpenClaw. Users can still utilize these tools by purchasing additional usage packages, which are now available at a discount, or by using a Claude API key to log in with their Claude account.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Could Surpass Gold ETFs in Asset Management, Analyst Predicts
data.description: ETF analyst James Seyffart has suggested that Bitcoin ETFs might soon exceed gold ETFs in terms of total assets under management. According to NS3.AI, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs attracted $1.32 billion in inflows during March, while U.S. gold ETFs experienced outflows totaling $2.92 billion. Seyffart noted that Bitcoin offers more diverse portfolio roles compared to gold, potentially driving its increasing popularity among investors.

data.title: Solana launches Agent Skills, enabling AI agents to interact with on-chain data.
data.description: The Solana Foundation announced the launch of Solana Agent Skills, providing pre-built functional modules that can be integrated into AI tools, allowing users to interact with the Solana blockchain through simple invocation. Official skills cover error handling, security checks, confidential transfers, and version compatibility. In addition, over 60 community skills have been launched simultaneously, covering areas such as DeFi, payments, and infrastructure, with participants including Jupiter Exchange, Raydium, Helius, dflow, and Metaplex.

data.title: Market Pricing Indicates Decreased Bets on Fed Rate Cuts in 2026
data.description: According to Jin10, market pricing data as of April 3 suggests a decline in bets on the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates in 2026. This shift in market sentiment reflects changing expectations regarding the Fed's monetary policy trajectory. Investors are closely monitoring economic indicators and Fed communications for further insights into potential rate adjustments.

data.title: Tether Seeks New Funding Round at $500 Billion Valuation
data.description: Tether is reportedly aiming to secure a new funding round with a valuation of approximately $500 billion. According to NS3.AI, the company has approached potential investors, requesting capital commitments to be submitted within the next two weeks. If successful, this funding round would position Tether among the highest-valued fintech companies globally.

data.title: FDIC to Discuss GENIUS Act Implementation and Stablecoin Regulations
data.description: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) has scheduled a board meeting for April 7 to initiate discussions on the detailed implementation of the GENIUS Act. According to NS3.AI, the meeting will focus on establishing a 1:1 reserve requirement for stablecoins. The agenda will explore whether banks can issue stablecoins through subsidiaries and how issuing entities will be defined. Additionally, the meeting will address supervision and risk management standards related to stablecoin issuance.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Lead in Social Dominance and AI Search Volume
data.description: Bitcoin has emerged as the leader in social dominance with a 29.7% share, according to NS3.AI. Meanwhile, Ethereum has taken the lead in AI search volume, accounting for 14%. In terms of social dominance, Ethereum ranks second with 11.85%, while Solana follows closely in AI search volume at 10%.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Criticizes ABC News and Comments on Employment Data
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump has publicly criticized ABC News journalist Jonathan Karl, labeling him a "third-rate anchor" and dismissing the content of his new book as "pure fabrication" and significantly inaccurate. According to BlockBeats, Trump also claimed that ABC had previously paid him $16 million in compensation for false and misleading reporting, describing the network as "the worst and most corrupt in the industry."

In addition, Trump commented on the latest U.S. employment data, noting that 178,000 non-farm jobs were added in March and the unemployment rate decreased. He described these figures as "very good data" and remarked that even media outlets critical of the government acknowledged this performance, emphasizing his slogan "Make America Great Again."

data.title: Moca Network Set to Unlock Tokens on April 11
data.description: Moca Network is scheduled to unlock approximately 27.58 million tokens on April 11 at 0:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $3.36 million, based on data from the Web3 asset platform RootData.

data.title: U.S. Employment Resilience Amid Middle East Tensions and Inflation Concerns
data.description:
On April 4, Huatai Securities noted that the stronger-than-expected non-farm payrolls in March indicate resilience in the U.S. job market. According to BlockBeats, the ongoing Middle East tensions, particularly the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, have led to a shortfall in oil supply, driving up oil prices and inflation expectations. Inflation remains a key variable for the Federal Reserve's monetary policy.

The Federal Reserve's dual mandate of employment and inflation provides some flexibility to avoid interest rate hikes to combat inflation. However, with rising inflation expectations, even if the Federal Reserve refrains from raising rates, the Treasury yield curve might shift upwards, effectively tightening financial conditions.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Highlights Positive March Employment Figures
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the U.S. economy added 178,000 non-farm jobs in March, with a decrease in the unemployment rate. According to Jin10, President Trump emphasized that this is a positive development for the economy, a sentiment shared even by media outlets he often criticizes. He reiterated his commitment to making America great again.

data.title: Bitcoin's Security Evolution Against Quantum Attacks
data.description:
The article delves into the potential threat of quantum attacks on Bitcoin and explores strategies for enhancing its security through algorithm upgrades. According to PANews, the focus is on understanding the time window during which quantum attacks could pose a significant risk and identifying pathways to counter these threats effectively.

The discussion highlights the importance of upgrading Bitcoin's cryptographic algorithms to withstand quantum computing capabilities. This evolution is crucial to ensure the continued security and integrity of Bitcoin transactions and holdings.

Experts emphasize the need for proactive measures to safeguard Bitcoin against future quantum threats, suggesting that timely upgrades and innovations in cryptographic techniques are essential for maintaining the cryptocurrency's resilience.

data.title: Japan's Financial Services Agency (FSA) has released new cybersecurity regulations for cryptocurrency exchanges, strengthening their three-tiered protection framework.
data.description: Japan's Financial Services Agency (FSA) released a policy on strengthening cybersecurity for companies such as cryptocurrency exchanges. With the core objective of protecting investor assets, the policy proposes a three-tiered security protection system: self-help, collaborative assistance, and public assistance. This system corresponds to collaborative protection by the companies themselves, self-regulatory organizations, and regulatory agencies, respectively. The policy points out that in addition to the leakage of signature keys such as mnemonic phrases, the risks of sophisticated attack methods such as social engineering attacks and intrusions into outsourced service providers are increasing, urging improvements in overall defense capabilities. Simultaneously, Japan plans to incorporate crypto-related scenarios into the "Delta Wall" cross-industry cybersecurity exercise to enhance the industry's emergency response capabilities. (CoinPost)

data.title: Crypto Market Experiences Significant Liquidations Over 24 Hours
data.description:
In the past 24 hours, the cryptocurrency market has seen substantial liquidations amounting to $72.1 million, according to ChainCatcher. Data from Coinglass reveals that long positions accounted for $36.95 million of the liquidations, while short positions totaled $35.15 million.

Bitcoin positions were notably affected, with long liquidations reaching $8.39 million and short liquidations at $8.04 million. Ethereum also experienced significant liquidations, with $6.83 million in long positions and $5.45 million in short positions being liquidated.

data.title: Coinglass Q1 Crypto Market Report: Total Trading Volume Reaches $20.57 Trillion, Binance Leads in Multiple Dimensions
data.description: A recent report from Coinglass shows that the total trading volume of the crypto market in the first quarter of 2026 was approximately $20.57 trillion, of which spot trading accounted for approximately $1.94 trillion and derivatives for approximately $18.63 trillion. The ratio of derivatives to spot trading volume was approximately 9.6 times, indicating that market activity remained primarily concentrated in the derivatives sector. The report points out that Binance maintained its leading position in several key metrics. Its first-quarter derivatives trading volume was approximately $4.90 trillion, accounting for approximately 34.9% of the top ten exchanges; its average open interest was approximately $23.9 billion, accounting for approximately 29.9%; and its user assets totaled approximately $152.9 billion, accounting for approximately 73.5% of major exchanges. Overall, the market has formed a structure with Binance at the top, OKX as the core of the second tier, and other platforms distributed in the secondary tier.

data.title: Japan's Financial Authority Unveils Cybersecurity Strategy for Crypto Platforms
data.description:
Japan's Financial Services Agency has announced a new cybersecurity strategy for cryptocurrency trading platforms. According to Foresight News, this initiative is based on 18 public opinions collected between February and March 2026, with the primary goal of protecting investors' assets. The strategy introduces a three-tier security enhancement framework: self-help (individual operators), mutual assistance (self-regulatory organizations), and public assistance (regulatory authorities).

The agency highlighted that cyberattacks have evolved from simple key theft to more sophisticated methods such as social engineering and supply chain intrusions, making traditional cold wallet management insufficient for security. Moving forward, the Financial Services Agency plans to conduct threat-led penetration testing (TLPT) on major operators and intends to revise operational guidelines to improve cybersecurity staffing and external audit standards.

data.title: The Drift team's associated address transferred 56.25 million DRIFT tokens, worth approximately $2.44 million, to an exchange.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, since the Drift Protocol security incident, wallet addresses associated with its team have transferred 56.25 million DRIFT tokens, worth approximately $2.44 million, to Bybit and Gate.
